versions.version_description: Capo'ed for open chords that ring out (matches sustained keyboard), well suited to acoustic covers, two different strumming variations defined.
The chords I've written out sound best on capo 6, but you can definitely transpose them to get a lower or a higher sound. Keep in mind I found these chords out by ear.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro - Fingerstyle]

[tab]   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
e|-----------------|-----------------|--------------------|
B|---2--------0----|------------2----|-------0---2---3----|
G|---2---2----1----|---6--------2----|---2----------------|
D|---0--------2----|---6---6----0----|--------------------|
A|-----------------|---4-------------|--------------------|
E|------------0----|-----------------|--------------------|[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
e|----------------|-----------------|---------------------|
B|--2--------0----|------------2----|---------------------|
G|--2---2----1----|---6---6----2----|---------------------|
D|--0--------2----|---6--------0----|---------------------|
A|----------------|---4-------------|---------------------|
E|-----------0----|-----------------|---------------------|[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I had a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
I got everything I wanted[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
Not what you'd think[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]               [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
And if I'm being honest[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
It might have been a nightmare[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
To anyone who might care[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
Thought I could fly[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
So I stepped off the Golden[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Nobody cried[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Nobody even noticed[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
I saw them standing right there[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Kinda thought they might care[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I had a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
I got everything I wanted[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
But when I wake up I see[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
You with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
And you say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
As long as I'm here[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
No one can hurt you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
Don't wanna lie here[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
But you can learn to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
If I could change[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#7[/ch]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
The way that you see yourself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
You wouldn't wonder why you hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
"They don't deserve you"[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
I tried to scream[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                   [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
But my head was under water[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
They called me weak[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                           [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Like I'm not just somebody's daughter[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
Could've been a nightmare[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]C#m[/ch]         [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
But it felt like they were right there[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]
And it feels like yesterday was a year ago[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C#m[/ch]                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
But I don't wanna let anybody know[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
Cause everybody wants something from me now[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
And I don't wanna let 'em down[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]
I had a dream[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
But when I wake up I see[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
You with me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
And you say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]
As long as I'm here[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
No one can hurt you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
Don't wanna lie here[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
But you can learn to[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
If I could change[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C#7[/ch]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
The way that you see yourself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
You wouldn't wonder why you hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
"They don't deserve you"[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
If I knew it all then[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#m[/ch]
Would I do it again[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Would I do it again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
If they knew what they said[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Would go straight to my head[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
What would they say instead[/tab]

If I knew it all then[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C#7[/ch]

[tab]               [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
Would I do it again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
If they knew what they said[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Would go straight to my head[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
